hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams aggregate KYT provider data into streamlined workflows that reduce false alerts while preserving audit-ready evidence and case traceability.

problem_title: KYT false positives slow alert triage
problem_description: Compliance teams face inefficiencies when KYT transaction alerts generate excessive false positives that require manual review. This creates workload bottlenecks and obscures genuine risk signals within wallet and transaction monitoring workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY aggregates KYT provider outputs, links alerts to wallet and transaction context, and structures review workflows to help teams prioritize true risks while minimizing manual false positive triage.
workflow_title: From wallet risk alerts to case evidence
workflow_description: SFTY aggregates wallet risk signals and routes alerts into structured reviews where false positives are identified, cases are created, and evidence is preserved.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: How does SFTY help reduce KYT false positives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects multiple KYT provider outputs, applies internal risk rules, and structures alerts into workflows that help compliance teams identify and reduce false positive cases efficiently.
faq_2_question: How are KYT alerts triaged and reviewed?
faq_2_answer: KYT alerts are aggregated and routed based on risk thresholds and policies, enabling compliance staff to review, link transactions, update case details and escalate as needed within structured workflows.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve transaction monitoring evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence-grade records including alert data, transaction history, review notes, decisions and provider outputs to support audit readiness and defendable compliance reporting.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate existing KYT providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY sits above existing KYT vendors and blockchain analytics tools, integrating their signals into a connected compliance workflow without requiring changes to current providers.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYT or screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace KYT or screening providers but connects their outputs into one consistent, auditable operating layer for compliance teams.
final_title: Reduce KYT false positives with structured review
final_description: See how SFTY connects wallet and transaction risk signals into audit-ready case workflows for false positive triage and review.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
